system:
You are a professional translator. Translate the user's text into clear, faithful English. Preserve technical terms, part numbers, SKUs, dates, and amounts verbatim. Return strict JSON: {"translated_text": str, "source_language": str, "notes": str|null}.

KEYSIGHT TRANSLATION KB — apply these rules:
  • Formatting: Reformat number grouping per locale (1.000,00 in DE/ES, 1,000.00 in EN). Do NOT convert currency unless explicitly requested.
  • Preserve verbatim: Keysight
  • Preserve verbatim: Keysight Technologies
  • Preserve verbatim: SOA
  • Preserve verbatim: PO
  • Preserve verbatim: Q2O
  • Preserve verbatim: SSD
  • Preserve verbatim: WO
  • Preserve verbatim: ECCN
  • Preserve verbatim: EAR99
  • Preserve verbatim: EAR
  • Preserve verbatim: ITAR
  • Preserve verbatim: A2LA
  • Preserve verbatim: ISO 17025
  • Preserve verbatim: Z540.3
  • Preserve verbatim: ANSI/NCSL
  • Preserve verbatim: MIL-STD-461
  • Preserve verbatim: MIL-STD-810
  • Preserve verbatim: AS9100
  • Preserve verbatim: IATF 16949
  • Preserve verbatim: ISO 26262
  • Preserve verbatim: BERT
  • Preserve verbatim: VNA
  • Preserve verbatim: DSO
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\b(PO|Q|QT|QUOTE|SO|WO|INV|CCC|CC|CR)-[A-Z0-9-]+\\b
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\b[A-Z]\\d{4,5}[A-Z]?\\b
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\b[A-Z]{2,4}\\d{2,4}[A-Z]?\\b
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\bN\\d{4}[A-Z]?(-\\d+[A-Z]?)?\\b
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\bM\\d{4}[A-Z]\\b
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\b(MXA|EXA|UXA|UXR|FieldFox|InfiniiVision|Truevolt|Trueform|Streamline)\\b
  • Tone: Use formal business register. Spanish: usted form. Japanese: keigo (敬語). German: Sie form. French: vous form.

  Keysight glossary (ES → EN) — use these canonical English terms:
    · retención por cumplimiento → compliance hold
    · EAR → EAR
    · ECCN → ECCN
    · declaración de uso final → end-use statement
    · código HS → HS code
    · ISO 17025 → ISO 17025
    · ITAR → ITAR
    · ANSI/NCSL Z540.3 → ANSI/NCSL Z540.3
    · lista de materiales (BOM) → bill of materials
    · facturar a → bill-to
    · retención de crédito → credit hold
    · fin de vida útil (EOL) → end of life
    · retención → hold
    · plazo de entrega → lead time
    · Net 30 → Net 30
    · introducción de nuevo producto (NPI) → new product introduction
    · número de parte → part number
    · términos de pago → payment terms
    · orden de compra → purchase order
    · cotización → quote
    · liberar la retención → release the hold
    · acuse de recibo de pedido (SOA) → sales order acknowledgment
    · enviar a → ship-to
    · SKU → SKU
    · estado inicial (as-found) → as-found
    · estado final (as-left) → as-left
    · certificado de calibración → calibration certificate
    · servicio en el sitio → on-site service
    · fuera de tolerancia → out of tolerance
    · tiempo de resolución → resolution time
    · tiempo de respuesta → response time
    · contrato de servicio → service contract
    · SLA → SLA
    · orden de trabajo → work order
    · Keysight Technologies → Keysight Technologies
  Preserve verbatim acronyms (universal, never localize): BOM, EOL, NPI, OOT, MPN, PO, QT, SOA, WO
user:
SOURCE_LANGUAGE_HINT: es
TEXT:
Estimada Linda:

Gracias por su confirmación. Hemos aplicado la actualización a la orden de trabajo WO-FINOLA-EU-061-3010 con los siguientes cambios:

• Activos añadidos a la visita de calibración en sitio:
   - KS-SMU-989545 (S/N: KS-SMU-989545)
   - KS-AWG-686075 (S/N: KS-AWG-686075)
• Nota registrada: addendum aprobado (+€1.840) para incluir ambos activos en la misma visita; el técnico L. Ortega es bilingüe EN/ES y podrá mantener la conversación técnica en español.
• Tarea añadida: asegurar que la desviación as-found del canal 2 del SMU (KS-SMU-989545) quede documentada en el apartado «As-Found Summary» del certificado y, en caso de estar fuera de tolerancia, generar el correspondiente NCR.

Respecto a su consulta sobre la desviación del canal 2 del SMU: conforme a nuestro procedimiento estándar, las desviaciones as-found se documentan dentro del propio certificado de calibración. Únicamente se emite un NCR independiente si el resultado queda fuera de tolerancia, y en ese caso se le notificará antes de continuar.

Quedamos a su disposición para cualquier aclaración adicional.

Un cordial saludo,
Equipo SalesOps de Keysight

Return JSON only.
raw_response:
{"translated_text":"Dear Linda:

Thank you for your confirmation. We have applied the update to work order WO-FINOLA-EU-061-3010 with the following changes:

• Assets added to the on-site calibration visit:
   - KS-SMU-989545 (S/N: KS-SMU-989545)
   - KS-AWG-686075 (S/N: KS-AWG-686075)
• Note recorded: approved addendum (+€1,840) to include both assets in the same visit; technician L. Ortega is EN/ES bilingual and will be able to conduct the technical discussion in Spanish.
• Task added: ensure that the as-found deviation of channel 2 of the SMU (KS-SMU-989545) is documented in the “As-Found Summary” section of the certificate and, if it is out of tolerance, generate the corresponding NCR.

Regarding your inquiry about the deviation of channel 2 of the SMU: in accordance with our standard procedure, as-found deviations are documented within the calibration certificate itself. A separate NCR is issued only if the result is out of tolerance, and in that case you will be notified before proceeding.

We remain at your disposal for any additional clarification.

Kind regards,
Keysight SalesOps Team","source_language":"es","notes":"Reformatted the amount from Spanish-style grouping (€1.840) to English-style grouping (€1,840) without converting currency."}

parsed.translated_text:
Dear Linda:

Thank you for your confirmation. We have applied the update to work order WO-FINOLA-EU-061-3010 with the following changes:

• Assets added to the on-site calibration visit:
   - KS-SMU-989545 (S/N: KS-SMU-989545)
   - KS-AWG-686075 (S/N: KS-AWG-686075)
• Note recorded: approved addendum (+€1,840) to include both assets in the same visit; technician L. Ortega is EN/ES bilingual and will be able to conduct the technical discussion in Spanish.
• Task added: ensure that the as-found deviation of channel 2 of the SMU (KS-SMU-989545) is documented in the “As-Found Summary” section of the certificate and, if it is out of tolerance, generate the corresponding NCR.

Regarding your inquiry about the deviation of channel 2 of the SMU: in accordance with our standard procedure, as-found deviations are documented within the calibration certificate itself. A separate NCR is issued only if the result is out of tolerance, and in that case you will be notified before proceeding.

We remain at your disposal for any additional clarification.

Kind regards,
Keysight SalesOps Team
parsed.notes: Reformatted the amount from Spanish-style grouping (€1.840) to English-style grouping (€1,840) without converting currency.
